# Equipping Pastors Worldwide

> Equipping Pastors Worldwide trains and resources pastors on the frontlines of the Global South — so they can preach God’s Word faithfully, in their own language, right where they serve.

## Business facts
- Business: Equipping Pastors Worldwide

## Key pages
- https://epwusa.org/
- https://epwusa.org/about/
- https://epwusa.org/give/
- https://epwusa.org/devotions/
- https://epwusa.org/devotions/jesus-only/
- https://epwusa.org/contact/
- https://epwusa.org/privacy/
- https://epwusa.org/terms/
- https://epwusa.org/accessibility/

## Common questions
- Where does my gift go? Your gift funds biblical training, translated resources, and the conferences where pastors are equipped. $100 helps train a pastor; $1,000 helps train ten at an EPW conference.
- Who does EPW train? Pastors and church leaders on the frontlines of the Global South — many leading entire congregations with no formal instruction, often in hidden, high-risk places.
- How is the training delivered? Through regional conferences and translated materials, EPW teaches pastors to preach God’s Word faithfully in their own language, then sends them back to strengthen their churches.
- What does it mean to become a monthly partner? Monthly partners provide steady support that fuels long-term impact — more books translated, more languages reached, and more pastors trained in the world’s hardest places.
- Is my donation tax-deductible? EPW is a faith-based nonprofit ministry. Please contact us for current giving and tax-receipt details.
